remember: Students will be able to recall and identify the key events and experiences described in the chapter
Students will be able to remember and describe the central theme of the chapter
Students will be able to recite and explain the main ideas and events from the chapter
understand: Students will be able to understand the significance of the events and experiences described in the chapter
Students will be able to comprehend the emotional and psychological impact of the events on the narrator
Students will be able to explain the role of childhood experiences in shaping one's personality and character
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts and ideas from the chapter to their own lives and experiences
Students will be able to use the chapter to develop their critical thinking and analytical skills
Students will be able to use the chapter to understand and appreciate the importance of childhood memories
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the use of language and literary devices in the chapter
Students will be able to analyze the themes and ideas presented in the chapter
Students will be able to analyze the ways in which the chapter reflects the cultural and social context of the narrator's childhood

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the significance of childhood experiences in shaping one's personality and character
As per NCERT objective 2: To analyze the role of memory in recalling and interpreting childhood experiences
board_exam_objectives: To analyze the ways in which the narrator's childhood experiences have influenced their adult life and worldview
To evaluate the significance of the chapter's themes and ideas in relation to the broader social and cultural context
To demonstrate an understanding of the literary devices and techniques used in the chapter to convey the narrator's experiences and emotions
